objective: Prevent BOM-corrupted MTASK JSON files from being generated and queued. Update VS task creation flow to always write UTF-8 without BOM, and add a pre-queue validator that rejects or auto-strips BOM before saving. Add a one-shot repair script to scan tasks/*.json and strip BOM safely with a log of touched files.
title: Harden MTASK JSON encoding against BOM
description: Observed blocker: MTASK-0109-RETRY1.json contains UTF-8 BOM (EF BB BF), causing worker parser (json.load with utf-8) to skip the task silently. Implement prevention + validation so future MTASKs cannot be BOM-tainted.
